message:
feat(engine): add strict_eq_values for JS float semantics + float literal tests

- Add strict_eq_values() function that correctly implements JavaScript
  strict equality for Float values: NaN !== NaN, -0 === +0
- Update eval_equality() to use strict_eq_values() for === operator
- Add 8 unit tests for parse_f64_numeric_literal covering decimal,
  leading/trailing dot, scientific notation, special values, separators
- Add 5 unit tests for strict_eq_values covering NaN, -0/+0, Int/Float

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
